Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}We're finally at the last episode... I wonder how it's going to end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I mentioned before how it caught my attention, but I was afraid it might be too scary for me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 11 25 25}But I'm glad I watched it! Guess it's important to break out of your comfort zone sometimes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Do you ever try watching things from genres you don't normally get into?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Oh, wow. I could learn a thing or two from you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Trying out all kinds of shows seems like a good way to find hidden gems.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, I'm like that too. Like, what if you try it and it turns out to be horrible?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But as we've seen, you never know when it might pay off to break out of your comfort zone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm the same way. Isn't it easier to try something new when you have someone with you for the ride?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It's also nice to be able to comment on it and see the other person's reaction.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Watching this together made me realize how much I appreciated the main character.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Like how she can't turn a blind eye to people in need, and extends her hand to almost anyone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}And of course, the way she kept pressing forward, no matter what happened. It was so inspiring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Come to think of it, isn't she just like you...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Remember how I told you about that girl I was close to who started ignoring me one day?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It's not like I did anything to make her hate me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}We'd been friends for a long time. But one day, out of the blue, she just said...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}"My mother told me I can't play with you anymore."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It's because there were rumors floating around about my parents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I kind of get it now, looking back, but... at the time, I was just... sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}This show made me realize I'd like to be a little more like the main character.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I want to be the kind of person who'd help anyone, at any time. Someone who's kind and strong.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It might be silly to say I look up to a fictional character, but there's no harm in following her example. At least that's what I think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari has been inspired by the protagonist[n]of the show we watched on DVD...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 11 25 25}{f 5 13 7 1 2}That ending was so good! I hope they'll make a sequel...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Споглядаючи за головним героєм, я почав[n]розуміти {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} дорослого...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'll bring more DVDs I'm curious about next time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It's about time we head back to our rooms. Have a good night, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
